title: Refurbished More Apps
description: Adds more apps to the Mcrafish furniture mod computer
body:
This mod adds more apps MrCrayfish's Refurbished furniture mods computer

List of all apps:

Tic-Tac-Toe
![tictactoe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54e3517efcce281b728b4da30eab8aa6bf6c6efe.png)

Minesweeper
![mnesweeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69da901872b648e6c2e391f780bd322ea6af7698.png)

Mail

![mail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/557efec4acd56139fb7e6d5c86d35153308653e1.png)

Russian Checkers
![checkers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/759293abb2f81aa55fc821291901c481b5ad5893.png)

Chess

![chess](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afe2ffde384eeabd18192cd98ac9216086855f0d.png)

All 2 player games support both PvP and game against AI.
Mail works based on computer and id you gave to it not the player, so chat on 1 computer is accesible to everyone who will use it.

[Join our Discord server and suggest apps!](https://discord.gg/6BJx5YZRK9)
obviously, the mod requires **MrCrayfish's Refurbished furniture mod**
